criteria.description: Repository contains the expected directories and files for foundation work.
Product docs define target quality, differentiation, and non-goals.
Architecture docs define layers, data flow, and constraints.
The repository contains durable AI continuation guidance, project state, and anti-drift decisions.
The repository contains a startup entrypoint, latest handoff, and task board for fast session continuation.
Slide spec and normalized source-unit schemas are present and include required planning and grounding fields.
Fixture-backed ingest, slide-spec drafting, and quality checks are present and regression-tested.
Local self-acceptance command and eval definitions are present.
